So over the course of today and Thursday, I'm gonna try to give an overview of the four areas that you need to excel at in order to maximize your chances of success at a startup. And then throughout the course, the guest speakers are gonna drill into all of these in more detail. So the four areas, you need a great idea, a great product, a great team and great execution. These overlap somewhat, but I'm gonna have to talk about them somewhat individually to make it make sense. You may still fail. The outcome is something like idea times product times execution times team times luck, where luck is the random number between 0 and 10,000. But if you do really well in the four areas you can control, you have a good chance of at least some amount of success.
